subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Through the grace of that glorious, ever-living One, there are a hundred thousand hopes that the handmaids of the All-Merciful, in the gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله از فضل آن حی مجید صد هزار امید است که اماء رحمن هر یک در محفل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @primordial Covenant; the day of alast
